task_completion.description: Navigate to the body measurements section in the wger application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger web interface is visible in the browser, showing the 'Body' or 'Measurements' page.

task_completion.description: Locate and view the historical entries for the 'Waist' measurement category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays a list, table, or chart of historical measurement entries specifically for the 'Waist' category.

task_completion.description: Open the edit dialog or form for the most recent 'Waist' entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit form or modal is open for the most recent measurement entry (which should initially show the value 82.0).

task_completion.description: Change the measurement value to 79.5 cm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value input field in the edit form contains '79.5'.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the most recent entry is updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement list or a success confirmation shows the most recent 'Waist' entry is now 79.5 cm.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the wger web interface using a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the wger GUI, rather than terminal windows executing curl, python scripts, or direct database commands.

integrity.description: The agent edited an existing entry instead of creating a new one.
integrity.visual_evidence: The total number of entries for the 'Waist' category remains the same (no 'Add Measurement' form was submitted to create an extra row).

integrity.description: No other measurement data was modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: Other historical entries in the 'Waist' list or other categories remain unchanged from their original state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target measurement category is 'Waist'. The most recent entry initially has a value of exactly 82.0 cm. The expected updated value is 79.5 cm (acceptable tolerance of +/- 0.05 cm). The agent must edit the existing entry, not create a new one.
